description: Annual mandatory refresher on Anti-Money Laundering and Know Your Customer procedures. All banking staff must complete this course before June 30th.
Understanding Basel III framework and capital adequacy requirements for banking professionals in Risk and Treasury departments.
Hands-on Python programming for financial data analysis including pandas data manipulation and automation of reports. Two-day workshop.
3-day immersive leadership program for managers and senior associates. Covers strategic thinking stakeholder management and team leadership.
Half-day workshop on delivering exceptional customer experiences in retail banking. Interactive role-play scenarios included.
Mandatory training on data privacy principles and GDPR compliance applicable to all employees.
Advanced Excel skills including pivot tables macros and financial modelling templates for banking analysts.
Annual mandatory cybersecurity awareness training covering phishing social engineering and secure banking practices.
Practical workshop on conflict resolution techniques and building a harmonious workplace culture.
Deep dive into bank financial statements including balance sheet P&L and cash flow analysis for banking professionals.
